selection_method: Curated from Ubuntu 24.04 apt binary and source metadata to cover a diverse set of applications, libraries, language runtimes, editors, bindings, servers, and CLI tools that use libuv at runtime, build time, or both.

dependents.name: bind9
dependents.runtime_functionality: The authoritative DNS server uses libuv for its event loop and asynchronous network handling.

dependents.name: nodejs
dependents.runtime_dependency: nodejs Depends: libnode109; libnode109 Depends: libuv1t64
dependents.runtime_functionality: Node.js uses libuv for its core event loop, timers, async filesystem work, signals, networking, and child-process integration.

dependents.name: neovim
dependents.build_dependency: neovim source Build-Depends: libuv1-dev and lua-luv-dev
dependents.runtime_functionality: Neovim relies on libuv for async jobs, timers, socket-based RPC, and filesystem watching.

dependents.name: knot-resolver
dependents.runtime_functionality: The recursive DNS resolver and daemon use libuv for asynchronous resolver and server I/O.

dependents.name: python3-uvloop
dependents.runtime_functionality: uvloop is an asyncio event loop implementation built directly on top of libuv.

dependents.name: r-cran-httpuv
dependents.runtime_functionality: The package uses libuv to provide HTTP and WebSocket server support inside R.

dependents.name: r-cran-fs
dependents.runtime_functionality: The package builds its cross-platform filesystem operations on top of libuv.

dependents.name: moarvm
dependents.runtime_functionality: MoarVM uses libuv for asynchronous sockets, timers, processes, and other concurrency features exposed to Rakudo and NQP.

dependents.name: lua-luv
dependents.runtime_functionality: This package exposes libuv's event loop and async I/O APIs to Lua programs.

dependents.name: libluv-ocaml
dependents.runtime_functionality: This runtime library exposes libuv's event loop and OS APIs to OCaml code.

dependents.name: ttyd
dependents.runtime_functionality: ttyd uses libuv-backed websocket/event-loop handling to share interactive terminal sessions over the web.

dependents.name: libh2o0.13t64
dependents.runtime_functionality: This is the libuv-linked H2O runtime library; applications linked against it use libuv-backed HTTP event loop integration.

dependents.name: libwebsockets-evlib-uv
dependents.runtime_functionality: This plugin provides the libuv event-loop backend for libwebsockets clients and servers.

dependents.name: libraft0
dependents.runtime_functionality: The shared library implements a fully asynchronous Raft consensus engine and uses libuv for its I/O layer.

dependents.name: libdqlite0
dependents.runtime_functionality: The distributed SQLite library uses libuv-backed asynchronous networking for clustered replication and failover.

dependents.name: libtensorpipe0
dependents.runtime_functionality: TensorPipe uses libuv for event-driven point-to-point communication between machine-learning processes.

dependents.name: storj
dependents.runtime_functionality: The Storj CLI and its underlying library use libuv for asynchronous network and file-transfer operations.

dependents.name: siridb-server
dependents.runtime_functionality: The time-series database server uses libuv for its async event loop and network-facing server work.
